This '''starship''' was owned by the [[New Jedi Order]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. It was used by [[Streen]] and [[Kirana Ti]] to travel to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corbos]] in response to [[Dorsk 82]]'s signal for help.

==Appearances==

*[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 3|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 3]]
